title: isolepis prolifera
intro: Isolepis prolifera, also known as the creeping grasswort, is a type of flowering plant in the sedge family (Cyperaceae). It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Isolepis prolifera include treating wounds, skin conditions, and infections, as well as reducing inflammation and pain. The plant is often prepared for herbal use by making teas or infusions from its leaves, and it can also be applied topically as a poultice or ointment.
